articles.author: Lucas Ropek
articles.title: OpenAI takes aim at Anthropic with beefed-up Codex that gives it more power over your desktop - TechCrunch
articles.description: OpenAI's agentic coding tool has gotten a major makeover, with a variety of new powers and abilities.
articles.content: There is currently a low-grade war between OpenAI and Anthropic over who can release the most convenient and powerful AI-coding tools and, so far, Anthropic seems to be winning. Claude Code has been … [+3678 chars]
